the beneficiary remained under the care of the original HHA based on the 
first billable visit date through and including the last billable visit date. The partial 
payment adjustment will be calculated by using the span of days (first billable service 
date through and including the last billable service date) under the original plan of care as 
a proportion of the 30-day period. The proportion will then be multiplied by the original 
case-mix and wage index to produce the 30-day payment. 

C.
